channel.title: kubernetes on Jacob Sanford
channel.description: Recent content in kubernetes on Jacob Sanford

item.title: Our Drupal 8 CI Workflow at UNB Libraries
item.description: In 2010, amid a usual morning of manual Drupal module updates, a colleague at UNB Libraries, Kassim Machioudi suggested: Imagine if we only needed to change a version number in a metadata file to push all of these updates? At the time, that idea seemed like a blue-sky dream. We were a small team, running many multisite and standalone instances of Drupal 5&6 across multiple servers. Drush make was not the stable solution it later became.
